blended.narrative: Mount Sunapee is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 47°F.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
